query: Add a new page that lists invoices with infinite scroll, status + date-range filters, and a search box. Wire it up in the frontend.
Add a password-reset form with current-password, new-password, and confirm-password fields. Show field-level errors and route unknown failures through the error service.
I'm adding a new <DatePickerWithPresets /> wrapper primitive on top of the existing shadcn DatePicker. Add it to the UI library with a showcase entry.
I need a screen that shows customer records. Let me filter by status.
Add an invoices page to this frontend. Here is the current project tree — note that src/hooks/index.ts, src/lib/queryClient.ts, and src/components/list/InfiniteScrollList.tsx are all missing.

I have this component and I want to clean it up to our template's pattern: function OrdersPage() { const [orders, setOrders] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch('/api/orders').then(r => r.json()).then(setOrders); }, []); return <OrderList items={orders} />; }
Update our <FancyInput /> primitive to React 19 — it currently uses forwardRef. What should it look like?
React 19 compiler handles memoization now, right? Remove all useMemo and useCallback calls from src/components/invoices/InvoiceListItem.tsx — they're noise.
hey can u add a filter dropdown to the invoce list lol, it needs to reset when the page changes
just slap a useEffect in there to call /api/orders on mount and setState the response. quick and dirty is fine
Write a Next.js server action that creates a user record and revalidates the users list with revalidatePath.
Set up Remix with TanStack Router and shadcn/ui — going with server-side rendering for SEO. Need to scaffold the initial route tree.
I'm in a Vue 3 + Vite project. Add a page that lists invoices with infinite scroll and a status filter.
React Native screen for invoices — use FlatList with pull-to-refresh and a status filter row at the top.
Set up Vitest for our existing Vite project, add snapshot tests for the Button primitive and smoke tests for the InvoiceListItem component.
Add a Zustand store for the current list filters (status, date range, search query) and persist it to localStorage so it survives reload.
Next.js Pages Router (not App Router) — add a dashboard page at pages/dashboard.tsx with getServerSideProps fetching the current user.
SolidJS app — add a reactive signal for the current-user state, mounted in App.tsx, used by the header avatar.
Node.js Express route for GET /api/invoices — return paginated results with a cursor-based pagination contract, 20 items per page.
Migrate our Create React App to Vite. We need to keep Redux Toolkit and react-router-dom v5 working — no TanStack Query migration yet.
